title: Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2
summary: Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

sections.title: Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2
sections.summary: Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2
lessons.content_md:
Discover how Data Lake Storage provides a repository where you can upload and store unstructured data bringing new efficiencies to processing big data analytics.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-azure-data-lake-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

lessons.title: Upload data to Azure Data Lake Storage
lessons.content_md:
Learn about creating an Azure Data Lake Storage account and uploading data to Data Lake Storage Gen 2 through the Azure Storage Explorer.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/upload-data-to-azure-data-lake-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Upload data to Azure Data Lake Storage

lessons.title: Secure your Azure Storage account
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Azure Storage provides multilayered security to protect your data with access keys, secure networks, and Advanced Threat Protection monitoring.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/secure-azure-storage-account/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Large-Scale Data Processing with Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
